overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy exploring a vibrant red sand beach at sunset with a boar companion, walking past massive overgrown ruins before transitioning to a misty jungle environment with ancient stone pathways.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with red sand and distant ruins

events.description: boar companion runs ahead and exits the frame to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red sand beach toward the waterline, accompanied by a small boar

notable_agents.action: small black boar walking ahead of the character along the beach

entered.detail: expansive beach with distinctive red-orange sand stretching along the coastline
calm ocean waters with gentle waves lapping against the shore
massive overgrown stone structure rising from the water with vegetation covering the walls
dark rocky outcroppings extending into the sea
steep cliff covered with dense trees and hanging red vines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a vibrant red sand beach at sunset, accompanied by a small boar. Massive ancient ruins rise from the water ahead, while the ocean stretches to the left and a vine-covered cliff lines the right side of the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ruins at sunset with rocky debris

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the base of the massive ruins
sun becomes visible on the horizon, creating intense golden reflection across the water surface

agents.ego_description: circling the ancient ruins while walking along the water's edge, moving toward the setting sun

entered.detail: bright sun sitting low on the horizon casting brilliant orange and pink light across the scene
scattered concrete rubble and large rocks littering the beach
partially submerged metal railing or road barrier in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character navigates around the massive ruins, turning left along the waterline. The sun becomes visible ahead, casting a brilliant golden path across the water. Rocky debris and submerged barriers appear on the left as the beach curves around the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown jungle path with ancient ruins

events.description: abrupt transition from beach sunset to misty jungle environment through a dark passage
emerging from dark tunnel into brighter misty jungle clearing with visible sun rays

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water and onto moss-covered stone pathways in the dense jungle

entered.detail: tall palm trees with broad green fronds leaning over the path
dense overhead tree cover creating dappled light and shadows
atmospheric fog and mist filtering through the trees with visible sun rays
rusted and bent metal street lamp overgrown with vines and vegetation
ancient cracked stone walkway covered with moss and surrounded by ferns

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a misty jungle environment. The character walks through shallow pools of water onto ancient stone pathways surrounded by dense vegetation, palm trees, and atmospheric fog. A broken street lamp stands as a remnant of the old world amidst the overgrown tropical setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vibrant red sand beach at sunset into a misty, overgrown jungle. It begins with the character and a small boar walking along the shoreline, flanked by a vine-covered cliff and massive ancient ruins rising from the water. As the camera navigates around these ruins, the path curves along the waterline toward a brilliant golden sun casting a shimmering trail across the ocean and rocky debris. The scene then shifts abruptly from the open coast into a dense tropical environment, where the character moves through shallow pools and onto ancient stone pathways. Finally, the landscape settles into a fog-shrouded jungle filled with palm trees and a solitary broken street lamp standing amidst the lush vegetation.
